allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add DHT, LLM, and Environment sprint plans

- DHT_SPRINT_PLAN.md: Distributed Hash Table for HPC deployments
  with consistent hashing, replication, and gossip protocol
- LLM_SPRINT_PLAN.md: Shared LLM infrastructure with provider
  abstraction, caching, rate limiting, and prompt management
- ENVIRONMENT_SPRINT_PLAN.md: Environment interface for sensors,
  actuators, and simulation backends \(MuJoCo, PyBullet, ROS2\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
docs: add Master Implementation Plan for all sprint plans

Comprehensive high-level plan covering 65+ sprints across 10 subsystems:
- 6 phases: Foundation, Core Cognitive, Integration, Advanced, Testing, Production
- Dependency graph showing critical path
- Phase exit criteria and success metrics
- Resource requirements and risk mitigation
- Sprint cross-reference matrix

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: implement Phase 1 and Phase 2 sprint infrastructure

Phase 1 \(Foundation\):
- Event Fabric: ZMQ XPUB/XSUB broker, Redis Streams backend with DLQ
- LLM Infrastructure: Provider abstraction \(Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama\),
  middleware stack with retry/logging, streaming support
- Environment Interface: Gymnasium-compatible API, structured observations
  \(Camera, LiDAR, IMU, Joint\), structured actions \(Joint, Cartesian, Gripper\)

Phase 2 \(Core Cognitive\):
- Semantic Memory: Qdrant vector store, embedding models
  \(SentenceTransformer, OpenAI\), SemanticMemoryClient
- Episodic Memory: PostgreSQL store with Decision Proof chain,
  EpisodicMemoryClient with episode lifecycle management
- DHT: Consistent hashing ring with virtual nodes, pluggable storage
  backends \(in-memory, Redis\), DHTClient with configurable replication

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat\(sprint-2\): complete Sprint 2 implementation across all subsystems

Sprint 2 Implementation:

LH Subsystem:
- Semantic/similarity search with streaming responses
- Safety client proto serialization
- PlanService action sequences

RH Subsystem:
- Full ControlService with Environment integration
- WorldModel action rollout with risk estimation
- Perception pipeline with state tracking

Memory Subsystem:
- Episodic memory with decision proofs \(hash chains\)
- Semantic memory batch operations

Safety Subsystem:
- YAML rule engine with hierarchical categories
- Constraint and precondition checking

Metacognition:
- ReasoningAnalyzer with pattern detection
- Confidence calibration and issue tracking

Integration:
- EventFabric with Redis pub/sub
- Standard event schemas for all subsystems

Environment:
- MuJoCo and Isaac Gym backends
- Async action execution

DHT:
- State manager with consistency protocols
- Server implementation

LLM:
- Caching middleware \(in-memory and Redis\)
- Rate limiting with token bucket

Tests:
- RH unit tests \(perception, world_model, control_service\)
- Fixed safety_client tests for proper mock behavior

Linting:
- Fixed all black formatting issues \(32 files\)
- Fixed all ruff errors \(B904, B905, F841\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(for f in src/agi/rh/control/primitives.py src/agi/rh/control/trajectory.py src/agi/rh/control/realtime.py src/agi/rh/control/robot_interface.py src/agi/rh/control/simulation.py)

Bash(for f in tests/unit/test_safety_learning.py tests/unit/test_llm_reflection.py tests/unit/test_nats_backend.py tests/unit/test_dht_observability.py tests/unit/test_dht_hpc.py tests/unit/test_dht_security.py tests/unit/test_llm_integration.py tests/lh/test_performance.py tests/lh/test_hpc_deploy.py tests/rh/test_primitives.py tests/rh/test_trajectory.py tests/rh/test_realtime.py tests/rh/test_robot_interface.py)

Bash(for f in tests/env/test_base.py tests/env/test_mujoco.py tests/env/test_pybullet.py tests/env/test_observations.py tests/env/test_actions.py tests/memory/test_lh_memory_integration.py tests/memory/test_safety_episodic_integration.py tests/memory/test_rh_memory_integration.py tests/integration/test_e2e_scenarios.py)
